scripts.build:desktop: node scripts/clean-app-builds.cjs desktop && next build && node scripts/prepare-kiosk.cjs && electron-builder --projectDir electron --win nsis
scripts.build:admin: node scripts/clean-app-builds.cjs admin && next build && node scripts/prepare-kiosk.cjs && electron-builder --projectDir electron-admin --win portable
scripts.build:kiosk: node scripts/clean-app-builds.cjs kiosk && next build && node scripts/prepare-kiosk.cjs && electron-builder --projectDir electron --win portable
